name: freezeops
description: Guardrails for AI-assisted development — deterministic safety rules for sensitive codebases

scripts.build: npm run build -w @freezeops/core && npm run build -w @freezeops/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @freezeops/core && npm run typecheck -w @freezeops/cli
scripts.validate: npm run build -w @freezeops/core && npm run typecheck && npm run build -w @freezeops/cli
